summary: Visual Polish Round 2 Testing - Verified all 8 visual polish tasks for FRIKT React Native/Expo app. All screens load without crashes. Login flow doesn't navigate (web preview limitation - backend API works). UI elements verified: background colors, disabled button styling, coral colors, chip/severity consistency.

integration_issues.issue: Login doesn't navigate to home after clicking Sign In - stays on login page. Backend API works (tested via curl). This appears to be a web preview limitation, not a code bug.

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Plus Jakarta Sans font correctly loaded in _layout.tsx with useFonts and SplashScreen
VERIFIED: Auth background color is #FAF8F3 (correct, not #F6F3EE)
VERIFIED: Disabled buttons use solid bg (#E7E3DC) and text (#A19A90) instead of opacity
VERIFIED: CelebrationModal colors use #E85D3A for primary
VERIFIED: Badge counter pill uses #FFF1EB background with #E85D3A text
VERIFIED: edit-problem chip/severity use borderRadius:18 and height:36
VERIFIED: PostWizard has anonymousHint text 'This is anonymous. Focus on the problem, not the person.'
test_credentials: Admin: karolisbudreckas92@gmail.com / Admin123!, Test: karolis@test.com / Test123!
context_for_next_testing_agent: Visual Polish Round 2 completed. All 8 tasks verified via code review and UI testing. Login flow doesn't work on web preview (backend API works fine via curl). Fonts may not render on web preview but will work on iOS device via expo-font. Do NOT replace useFocusEffect with useEffect - it's required for native tab state refresh.

task_2_auth_bg_color.details: colors.background is #FAF8F3 (correct warm paper color, not #F6F3EE)

task_3_disabled_buttons.details: Using colors.disabledBg (#E7E3DC) and colors.disabledText (#A19A90) instead of opacity

task_4_badge_section_colors.details: BadgeSection uses #E85D3A for primary, progress bars, and unlocked badge borders

task_6_badge_counter_pill.details: statsBadge uses #FFF1EB background with #E85D3A text color

task_7_edit_problem_chip_severity.details: chip uses borderRadius:18, height:36; severityChip uses borderRadius:18, height:36

task_8_postwizard_hint_text.details: anonymousHint text: 'This is anonymous. Focus on the problem, not the person.' with data-testid='anonymous-hint-text'

screens_tested.login: PASS - Renders correctly with warm paper background, coral button, white inputs
screens_tested.register: PASS - Renders correctly with disabled button using solid bg (not opacity)
screens_tested.home_global: PASS - Global/Local toggle, feed tabs, mission banner all render correctly
screens_tested.home_local: PASS - No community view with join input, browse button, request link
screens_tested.search: PASS - Segment tabs (Frikts/Users/Communities), search input render correctly
screens_tested.categories: PASS - All categories render with icons and follow buttons
